channel.title: Announcing a New Version of the Frontity Docs
channel.description:
We’re delighted to announce that we've released a new structure of our Docs to make them more comprehensible
Documentation is one of our **key priorities** here at Frontity and we want it to be the best possible resource for our community.
After several months of work, we’re excited to announce that **we have revamped our documentation** to bring you more helpful resources and improve your experience with Frontity.
In addition to our recently announced [step-by-step tutorial](https://frontity.org/blog/learn-frontity-with-our-new-step-by-step-tutorial/), we’ve published a new API reference site and reorganised our docs across three different sites:
* [Step-by-step tutorial](https://tutorial.frontity.org/) * [Conceptual understanding / Guides](https://docs.frontity.org/) * [API Reference](https://api.frontity.org/)
The goal of the changes we’ve made is to provide you with the most useful information in the most appropriate context as and when you need it.
For more information see our [blog post announcing its publication](https://frontity.org/blog/announcing-a-new-version-of-the-frontity-docs/).
https://frontity.org/blog/announcing-a-new-version-of-the-frontity-docs/

item.title: Announcing a New Version of the Frontity Docs
item.dc:creator: jewel
item.description:
Great. Thank you so much

Read full topic
item.source: Announcing a New Version of the Frontity Docs

item.title: Announcing a New Version of the Frontity Docs
item.dc:creator: Pablo
item.description:
Great job @documentation-team! I’m really happy to see this live

Read full topic
item.source: Announcing a New Version of the Frontity Docs

item.title: Announcing a New Version of the Frontity Docs
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
We’re delighted to announce that we’ve released a new structure of our Docs to make them more comprehensible

Documentation is one of our key priorities here at Frontity and we want it to be the best possible resource for our community.

After several months of work, we’re excited to announce that we have revamped our documentation to bring you more helpful resources and improve your experience with Frontity.

In addition to our recently announced step-by-step tutorial, we’ve published a new API reference site and reorganised our docs across three different sites:

  • Step-by-step tutorial
  • Conceptual understanding / Guides
  • API Reference

The goal of the changes we’ve made is to provide you with the most useful information in the most appropriate context as and when you need it.

For more information see our blog post announcing its publication.

Frontity – 18 Feb 21

Announcing a New Version of the Frontity Docs

We're excited to announce that we have revamped our docs to bring you more helpful resources and improve your experience with Frontity.

Read full topic
item.source: Announcing a New Version of the Frontity Docs
